ja: sinceは活動や状況が始まった時を表すのに使います。例えば、I've worked at the BBC since 2024.
zhTW: 我們用since來談論活動或情況開始的時間。例如，I've worked at the BBC since 2024.
vi: Chung ta dung since de noi ve thoi diem hoat dong hoac tinh huong bat dau. Vi du, I've worked at the BBC since 2024.

ja: I've been working at the BBC since 2024. 両方の文で現在完了形を使ったことに気づきましたか？
zhTW: I've been working at the BBC since 2024. 你有注意到我這兩個句子都用了現在完成式嗎？
vi: I've been working at the BBC since 2024. Ban co nhan ra toi dung thi hien tai hoan thanh cho ca hai cau khong?

en: That's because although the action started in 2024, the situation is still true now.

ja: 行動は2024年に始まったが、状況は今も続いているからです。
zhTW: 因為雖然動作在2024年開始，但這個情況到現在還是事實。
vi: Vi du hanh dong bat dau tu 2024, nhung tinh huong van dung cho den bay gio.

ja: 現在完了形は主語+have+過去分詞です。
zhTW: 我們可以用現在完成簡單式，就是主詞加have加過去分詞。
vi: Chung ta co the dung thi hien tai hoan thanh don, la chu ngu cong have cong qua khu phan tu.

en: For example, I've played the guitar since I was a teenager.
ja: 例えば、10代の頃からギターを弾いています。
zhTW: 例如，I've played the guitar since I was a teenager.
vi: Vi du, I've played the guitar since I was a teenager.

ja: または現在完了進行形、主語+have+been+動詞のing形です。
zhTW: 或者現在完成進行式，就是主詞加have加been加動詞ing。
vi: Hoac thi hien tai hoan thanh tiep dien, la chu ngu cong have cong been cong dong tu dang ing.

en: For example, You have been learning English since 2015.
ko: + 동사의 ing형이야. 예를 들면 2015년부터 영어를 배워오고 있어
ja: 例えば、あなたは2015年から英語を学んでいます。
zhTW: 例如，You have been learning English since 2015.
vi: Vi du, You have been learning English since 2015.

en: If the speaker is still living in Bangalore now, they should use the present perfect, either the present perfect simple or continuous.

ja: 話者がまだバンガロールに住んでいるなら、現在完了形を使うべきです。
zhTW: 如果說話者現在還住在班加羅爾，就應該用現在完成式，簡單式或進行式都可以。
vi: Neu nguoi noi van dang song o Bangalore, nen dung thi hien tai hoan thanh, don hoac tiep dien.

ja: 文を直しましょう。I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
zhTW: 那我們來修正那個句子。I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.
vi: Hay sua cau do. I have lived in Bangalore since 2003.

vi: Hoac I have been living in Bangalore since 2003. Thi hien tai hoan thanh don va tiep dien khac nhau the nao?

en: Visit our website to find out.
ja: ウェブサイトで確認してください。
zhTW: 請到我們的網站了解更多。
vi: Hay truy cap trang web cua chung toi de tim hieu.
